I Recently Discovered How To Heat Any Space In My House In Under 5-Minutes, WITHOUT Using My Home's Costly Heating System

by Douglas JonesSeptember 27, 2025

The national weather services are reporting that it is going to be a SUPER COLD WINTER, maybe one of the coldest for decades. Are you prepared?

For the past few years, the heating industry had just 3 big companies that could set any prices they wanted and kept ripping off customers. A tech startup is turning this £5 billion industry on its head.

The company called HeaterLux has figured out a way to offer a far superior product (even the biggest tech experts agree) at a fraction of the price.

With almost a million units sold worldwide, this ultra-efficient heater is quickly becoming the most successful device of 2025.

What is it?

Meet the HeaterLux.

A convection ceramic heater with an incredible 99.8% efficiency.

The HeaterLux company was formed in 2019 by a group of experienced electric engineers from the EV (Electric vehicle) industry.

Their goal was to make a low cost and low maintenance portable heater that is suitable for any home, office or car.

With no installation costs, no maintenance costs and it extremely energy efficient, the HeaterLux is an engineering masterpiece.

This new type of heater has an incredible 99.8% efficiency. Losing almost no power to energy leakage. It's better for the environment and your wallet.

It heats up any mid sized room within 60 seconds. No other heater is this efficient, but what makes the HeaterLux special is it's price, ultra-compact design and portability.

In my opinion, this is the next generation of heaters.

How does it work?

It's really easy to set up:

  1. Set the HeaterLux on a flat surface
  2. Plug it in
  3. Set your desired temperature
  4. Wait while this powerful device heats the entire room, car, RV, garage, etc...

You can take it anywhere you want, get instant relief from the cold wherever you go.

BUT, it does more than just warm up the room. The HeaterLux also filters your surrounding air with a built in antimicrobial air filter, making it healthier and easier to breathe. Especially great for those with allergies and/or pets!

No need to worry about noise either, the HeaterLux is extremely quiet and barely noticeable. Perfect for in the bedroom during those cold winter nights.

What exactly can the HeaterLux do?

More than you think!

Set your mode - Never too warm or too cold, choose the heat setting you like.

Built in timer - Set a timer to automatically turn the HeaterLux off. Great for when you're getting in bed.

Built in kill switch - If the were to accidentally fall over, it will automatically shut off.

Portable - The outer casing does not get warm, you can move the HeaterLux around without worrying about burning your fingers.

Air Quality Control - The built in antimicrobial filter will catch dust and prevent any mold from growing. Great for people with allergies & pets.

Fast and Efficient - HeaterLux warms any space REALLY FAST! In just 60 seconds, enjoy High-Heat mode as HeaterLux out 2.7 m/s of warm air.

Easy to use - Very easy to set up, within 1 minute you will have it ready to go.

Lightweight - Compact and easy to carry. It comes with its own carry handle.

Extremely Quiet - No loud, obnoxious fan noise to disrupt your concentration or sleep.

Very Safe - Unlike other heaters, the Heat does not have any exposed elements that can accidentally burn you.

and there is even more!

The HeaterLux has an antimicrobial filter to trap dust and prevent mold from growing. It also helps in removing bad smells, keeping your home nice and fresh at all times.

One thing is for certain, once you try the HeaterLux, you'll never want to go back to life without it!

Some questions we've had

Q: Does HeaterLux require any installation?

No, it works directly out of the box and is really simple to use. You will have it heating up any room in less than 60 seconds.

Q: Where should I set up the HeaterLux?

On any flat surface, away from objects that can easily catch fire.

Q: Is the HeaterLux safe to use when sleeping?

Absolutely. The HeaterLux has an Auto-Shutoff Safeguard. You are not in danger of having it overheat and harm your child or start a fire.

Q: How long will shipping take?

3 to 5 business days.

Q: Does it have required certifications?

Yes, it does. The HeaterLux is tested and approved for home safety.

Q: Can I hang it on a wall? 

You can use the top handle to hang the heater anywhere in the house, high or low.

How Much Does It Cost?

With similar (less efficient) devices going for £500 + you would expect the HeaterLux to be at least this...

But what if I told you that the HeaterLux retails for £139.99, this is way below your expectations right!

How Can It Be So Affordable?

Did you know big brands spend BILLIONS on advertising, physical stores, and boss bonuses? Can you guess who's paying for that? Yep, us the customers...

The HeaterLux spends nothing on any of this. They only sell online, don't advertise on TV and don't have greedy owners who demand ridiculous bonuses.

They prefer to let their devices and positive reviews do the talking for them!

Conclusion: Is it worth it?

100% Yes. With winter around the corner, the HeaterLux is the cheapest and best way to stay warm and comfortable.

The time to buy the HeaterLux is now before this discount runs out. It's already selling like crazy you'll quickly see why thousands of Britons have ordered theirs already!

The HeaterLux feels better than most £500 space heaters.

The icing on the cake is the price. If it's still on promotion for under £70 - definitely, pick up before they go.

In case you couldn't guess, I LOVED it! You won't find a better heater for a better price.
